prompt: Colour the sun, say adlaw, then point to the sun outside.
Colour the house and say balay when you get home.
Say tubig together when pouring a drink of water.
Open a book and say libro before reading together.
Roll a ball, say bola, then pass it back and forth.
Pick up a favourite toy and say hampanganan before play.
Point to a family photo and say pamilya together.
Say nanay when looking at or talking about mother.
Say tatay when looking at or talking about father.
Touch the table at home and say lamesa.
Hold a cup at snack time and say tasa together.
